'''Shocking Plant Bulb''' is a resource item.

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Shocking Plant Bulb}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
It seems almost unfair that plants could become electrified – a secret guarded closely by eels until now. These bulbs still contain a residual trace of that lightning charge, making them much desired in herblore.
}}
